title: （頑張り上手の）ほどほど上手

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While at the pool...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I swam like a fish out there, but now I'm
stiff as a board. I think that's enough for today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Nature! That was some good trainin' out
there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Hishiama. I wouldn't call it good, per say... It
was just a quick dip.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That so? Then how about an extra lap with yours truly? I'll give you a real workout!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? N-now? I couldn't... I'd just be in your way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't be shy! I can stick it out till you're
cryin' uncle!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, greeeat... Hm? Wait... Any minute now, she
should be...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually... before we start training, there's
something I've been meaning to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it? I'm all ears!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Great! I wanted to ask about legwork, particularly
during a race...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...So this way you can use all the power in your
legs when you run, see?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. Who would've thought... Yup,
this has really helped me out.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Hishiama and Nature! Did you get in a good
workout?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, right on sche—I mean, yeah, same to you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, this racer's been having trouble with
her swimming form. She's been training
independently very frequently as of late.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That so? You're better off asking me for advice.
I'd be happy to check your form for ya.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What, really?! Do you happen to have some time
right now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Leave it to ol' Hishiama! You can join
Nature for her training—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, no, I couldn't! I've already gotten the advice I
was after.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pour all of your focus into her, I insist! Anyhoo, I'll
catch you again some other time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ooh, my back...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh, she was already on her last legs? She
should've just told me instead of dancing around
the topic.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, she did a fine job weaseling her way out of
this one, but I won't let her get away next time!
